opening_line: My neighbor's door says 4B. It's always been 4C. Someone changed the numbers. Who authorized that?
notes_for_player: Directory lists 4C at that position. Plaque mismatch on feed.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Fourth floor. Between the stairwell and the elevator.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: No person. Just the wrong number on the door. Brass plate, new scratches.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: I noticed when I came back from night shift. Tonight. Unless it was always wrong.
